prompt: Analyze the spec for inconsistencies and duplications before we start implementation
Run /spec-kitty.analyze to identify ambiguities across spec.md, plan.md, and tasks.md
Check the three core artifacts for conflicts and underspecified items after tasks.md was generated
Generate a checklist to validate requirements quality in the spec
Accept the spec-kitty plan and begin implementation
Ask clarifying questions about the underspecified parts of the feature spec
